description_long: This is a thick, dark brown hardcover book with ornate metallic corner protectors and two brown leather straps securing it shut. The cover features intricate white designs, including a central raised skull motif surrounded by geometric patterns and arcane symbols. The book's edges are visibly textured, resembling aged, slightly yellowed paper. The spine is embossed with bold white text and additional decorative symbols, giving it a mysterious, almost occult appearance. The metallic elements on the corners and straps add a sense of durability and weight. The overall aesthetic is gothic and antiquarian, suggesting a book of forbidden or esoteric knowledge.
description: A thick, dark brown hardcover book with metallic corners, leather straps, and a raised skull motif on the cover, adorned with white arcane designs.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the textured pages and metallic corner protectors, with the leather straps visible along the edge.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the top, highlighting the ornate cover with the central skull, white arcane symbols, and the full extent of the metallic and leather details.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the other edge of the book, again showing the textured pages, metallic corners, and the continuation of the leather straps.
description_view_3: The spine is visible, displaying bold white text and decorative symbols, with the leather straps crossing over and metallic corners at each end.
attribute_cover_illustration: The cover features a raised, sculpted skull at its center, surrounded by intricate white geometric and arcane symbols. The design is gothic and mysterious, with metallic corner accents and leather straps adding to its antiquarian style.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark brown with bold white embossed text and decorative symbols, oriented horizontally. Leather straps and metallic corner protectors add further visual interest.
